title: McBunneh CPVP Purple
description: This CPVP pack adds better quality , better anchors , better fps , low fire , beautiful colours
body:
💜 Purple CPvP Pack – Clean Combat, Zero Clutter

Step into the arena with Purple CPvP Pack, a smooth and minimal texture pack built for competitive Crystal PvP. Focused purely on clarity and performance, this pack keeps your visuals sharp without unnecessary edits.

✨ Features
💜 Subtle purple aesthetic – clean accents without overdoing it
🧪 Clear potions & particles – better visibility during intense fights
💎 Refined crystals & explosions – easier tracking and timing
🎯 Minimal visual noise – see exactly what matters in combat
🚀 FPS-friendly – optimized for smooth performance
🚫 What’s NOT changed
❌ No GUI edits
❌ No sword retextures
🎮 Perfect For
Crystal PvP (CPvP)
Practice servers & duels
Players who want a clean look without changing core visuals
